title.en: Ye Tian held a huge silver stone and muttered.

content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian came to the warehouse where the gold ore of Nome was stored, and there was also a large array shrouded here to ensure the safety of this place.

Of course, these formations may not be safe, and they may still be breached, so that the Noum's gold will be robbed by the wanderers.

"This is Nome's Gold Ore!"

Ye Tian held a huge silver stone and muttered.

From this piece of ore, he sensed a special ultimate particle that was extremely dense, extremely dense, and the ultimate particles were very large.

It is impossible for such ores to exist in the Ultimate Land, and there are many such ores in the Abyss of Arromu, and they are definitely not rare.

If it is rare, a mere eagle department will definitely not be able to occupy it, and it has long been snatched away by a tribe like the Golden God Ministry.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian began to refine the gold ore of Nome here.

"It should be very safe here, unlike the Eagle Ministry, which is snooped on by many strong people, and the copying talent should be available here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This time, he crossed the ultimate time and space and came to this era, and the copying talent was also carried over, and he could copy the body.

It's just that I don't dare to use it at all, otherwise it will be easy to be exposed.

But here, it's not easy to expose.

Immediately, he began to condense and copy his body.

After a while, a replica body was condensed, and he let this replica body refine Nome's gold, while he himself cultivated in the mansion in Area 76 to improve his strength.

In this way, time gradually passed, Ye Tian's strength was improving, and the gold of Nome he refined was also increasing.

......

Outside the Nome vein, not very far from here, a series of figures appeared, and the aura of each figure was extremely powerful, which was the strength of the general.

Soon, another general came.

"Do you really want to attack the Nome vein this time?"

"Naturally, we have to start, the Nome ore vein has been mined for a long time, and we should have accumulated a lot of Nome ore or even the gold of Nome that has been refined, and snatching a part of it at once is enough to exchange for a lot of resources, which is enough to improve our strength!"

A general-level existence said.

"There is also a king-level of the Eagle Department in the Nome vein, once we make a move, that king-level can be killed in a few breaths, we don't have a king-level, that king-level can easily kill us. "

"Yes, we generals can't deal with a king-level when we join forces, so snatching the Nome ore vein like this is looking for death!"

"Monkey, what do you think when you summoned us for this operation?"

"Monkey, if there is no way, we will not agree to cooperate. "

The one who was stared at by many generals was a bald strong man, and he was the top general-level existence - the monkey.

At this time, the monkey took out an item, which was a spar, and the inside of the spar was sealed with a drop of black water.

Seeing this drop of water, the faces of all the generals changed drastically.

"Darkest Liquid, you got this. "

All the generals were surprised.

It's not that the Dark Liquid is so precious, this thing is actually worthless, and it can't improve its strength, but it has a terrifying corrosiveness, and the general level will die when it touches it, even the king level will not dare to touch it.

And this thing is a forbidden thing, the Golden God Department does not allow this kind of thing to be traded, and it comes from a special place, and it is difficult to bring the general level out of it.

Unexpectedly, the monkey got a drop of dark liquid.

The monkey said: "To the dark magic liquid, I can urge the dark magic liquid, turn it into a demon sea, cover the king-level mansion, seal it, with the strength of that king-level, if you want to break through the dark magic liquid, it will take some time, and if the dark magic liquid is not controlled, it will gradually spread, and even corrode the Nome ore vein, which will cause huge losses." That King will probably take the time to deal with the Darkliquid and not rescue anywhere else, so you have plenty of time to loot the Gold Ore of Nome. "

"Good!"

The existence of many generals is very excited.

But at this time, the monkey also made his own request, "After the deed is completed, I want thirty percent of the gold ore of Nome in your hands." "

"Sansei, that's too much, isn't it?"

Many general-level existences were a little hesitant, they went to snatch the Nome ore, and as a result, they had to take out thirty percent of it to the monkeys, who would be willing to do it?

"This operation was organized by me, and I took out the Dark Magic Liquid, if that king-level hadn't been delayed, would you dare to snatch the Nome vein?"

The monkey said coldly.

"I agree!" one of the general-level beings agreed.

Immediately afterward, a bit began to agree.

Eventually, they chose to sign the ultimate contract.

Subsequently, they began to discuss how to do it, naturally they could not concentrate on one position to do it, so they would not be able to snatch much Nome ore, and they had to be separated.

......

Nome Vein, Area 76.

Soon, three general-level beings came nearby and hid.

These three general-level existences are the three brothers White Fang, White Gu, and White Calamity, they used to belong to the members of the Bai tribe, but the Bai tribe belonged to a small tribe, and they were wiped out by other tribes, so they became members of the You clan.

Now, they have all broken through to the general level, and they belong to the middle level among the general ranks.

"~ Big brother, I have inquired about this No. 76 area, and it is a newly promoted general stationed in the sky, and the strength should be average. "

"If we break through here and snatch the Nome ore here, even if we hand over 30%, we can still make a lot of money. "

"Just wait for the signal now, as long as the monkey side successfully drags that king-level, we will do it immediately!"

"Then wait!"

The other side.

Area 1.

Elder Tuo's residence.

Suddenly, Elder Tuo realized that something was wrong, and his ultimate will spread.

"There are enemies!"

Rumble!!!!!!

The Dark Liquid continued to surge, instantly turning into a sea of demons, enveloping this area.

"Dark Liquid!!"

Elder Tuo realized that something was wrong, this was a wandering clan snatching the Nome mineral, and he immediately asked for help and asked the Eagle Department to send other kings over.

Immediately after, he urged an ultimate weapon, as well as a formation, to protect the area.

However, under the corrosion of the Dark Liquid, the formation gradually collapsed.

"Damn it!"

Elder Tuo's face changed drastically.

He had sensed that a battle had broken out in other areas of the Nome Vein, and he wanted to go to his aid, but once the dark liquid covered the place, it was not easy for him to get out for a while.
